'''fadhumu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:llamaback|llamaback]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-dh-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:llamaback|llamaback]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| fadhumu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:fædhimith|fædhimith]] || [[word:fædhimij|fædhimij]] || [[word:fædhimish|fædhimish]] || [[word:fædhimi|fædhimi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:fadhudhumuth|fadhudhumuth]] || [[word:fadhudhumuj|fadhudhumuj]] || [[word:fadhudhumush|fadhudhumush]] || [[word:fadhudhumu|fadhudhumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:fadhumuth|fadhumuth]] || [[word:fadhumuj|fadhumuj]] || [[word:fadhumush|fadhumush]] || [[word:fadhumu|fadhumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:fadhufmuth|fadhufmuth]] || [[word:fadhufmuj|fadhufmuj]] || [[word:fadhufmush|fadhufmush]] || [[word:fadhufmuf|fadhufmuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fadhumuthu|fadhumuthu]] || [[word:fadhumuju|fadhumuju]] || [[word:fadhumushu|fadhumushu]] || [[word:fadhumuku|fadhumuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fadhumuth|fadhumuth]] || [[word:fadhumuj|fadhumuj]] || [[word:fadhumush|fadhumush]] || [[word:fadhumu|fadhumu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fadhumuthul|fadhumuthul]] || [[word:fadhumujul|fadhumujul]] || [[word:fadhumushul|fadhumushul]] || [[word:fadhumukul|fadhumukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fadhumuthuthu|fadhumuthuthu]] || [[word:fadhumujuju|fadhumujuju]] || [[word:fadhumushushu|fadhumushushu]] || [[word:fadhumuku|fadhumuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fadhumuthun|fadhumuthun]] || [[word:fadhumujun|fadhumujun]] || [[word:fadhumushun|fadhumushun]] || [[word:fadhumukun|fadhumukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fadhumuthuoro|fadhumuthuoro]] || [[word:fadhumujuoro|fadhumujuoro]] || [[word:fadhumushuoro|fadhumushuoro]] || [[word:fadhumukuoro|fadhumukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7296ca6}}
